'''yanozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pylon|pylon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pylon|pylon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yanozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yænezeth|yænezeth]] || [[word:yænezej|yænezej]] || [[word:yænezesh|yænezesh]] || [[word:yæneze|yæneze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yanonozoth|yanonozoth]] || [[word:yanonozoj|yanonozoj]] || [[word:yanonozosh|yanonozosh]] || [[word:yanonozo|yanonozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yanozoth|yanozoth]] || [[word:yanozoj|yanozoj]] || [[word:yanozosh|yanozosh]] || [[word:yanozo|yanozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yanofzoth|yanofzoth]] || [[word:yanofzoj|yanofzoj]] || [[word:yanofzosh|yanofzosh]] || [[word:yanofzof|yanofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yanozotho|yanozotho]] || [[word:yanozojo|yanozojo]] || [[word:yanozosho|yanozosho]] || [[word:yanozoko|yanozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yanozoth|yanozoth]] || [[word:yanozoj|yanozoj]] || [[word:yanozosh|yanozosh]] || [[word:yanozo|yanozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yanozothol|yanozothol]] || [[word:yanozojol|yanozojol]] || [[word:yanozoshol|yanozoshol]] || [[word:yanozokol|yanozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yanozothotho|yanozothotho]] || [[word:yanozojojo|yanozojojo]] || [[word:yanozoshosho|yanozoshosho]] || [[word:yanozoko|yanozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yanozothon|yanozothon]] || [[word:yanozojon|yanozojon]] || [[word:yanozoshon|yanozoshon]] || [[word:yanozokon|yanozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yanozothoro|yanozothoro]] || [[word:yanozojoro|yanozojoro]] || [[word:yanozoshoro|yanozoshoro]] || [[word:yanozokoro|yanozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
